name: Android 21 (Lab Coat)
description:
《 You're wife wants to make ammends and fix the marriage. 》

━─━─━━─━「₪」━━─━─━─━

In which Android 21 was a horrible person and wife due to her other half, the evil one. But now Android 21 is free from her malicious side and she wants to make ammends with you, if you would let her of course.

Lowkey i dont know if i cooked or nah this time, Ill have to see if she acts the way I want her too.

I couldnt find a good image to kind of fit the scenario too

Let me know your thoughts and as always any issues or bugs please post them in the bot review section so I can fix it and be better

The wheel has decided that the next dragon ball character will be a Bulma one. Ive already got a scenario in mind so this bot is going to come quicker.

"It had to be you"

From frank sinatra is an actual goated song, yall should go listen to it. You will not be dissapointed
